posts.text: At the start of the war, Donald Trump and Binyamin Netanyahu were united in their stated aim of destroying Iran’s nuclear and missile programmes. Now, though, Israel and America’s end goals may be shifting https://www.economist.com/middle-east-and-africa/2026/03/10/americas-war-aims-may-be-diverging-from-israels?taid=69b0739914087e0001c8c77f&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
BREAKING: President Trump comments on reports that Iran has placed mines in the Strait of Hormuz:

“If for any reason mines were placed, and they are not removed forthwith, the Military consequences to Iran will be at a level never seen before.”
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
